title: katanarkao #2655
definition:
1) to cause to grow numb or torpid
 2) to be torpid, inactive, to be to the detriment of one
 3) to weigh heavily upon, be burdensome to
nasbUsage:

 2) to be torpid, inactive, to be to the detriment of one
 3) to weigh heavily upon, be burdensome to

    NASB:  to grow numb:
